## Problem

What debugging pain are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior and expected UX.

## Roadmap Alignment

Which `ROADMAP.md` section does this fit?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you evaluate?

## Success Criteria

How do we know this feature is complete and useful?
